footer_text: Kindly inform our associates of any allergies you may have.
All prices are in INR, exclusive of taxes. We levy no service charge.
The calorie content is per 100 grams of the serving.
notes: Page intent: menu_items_page. Single main column with two dishes under '15 MINUTES MEALS'. Prices are right-aligned in same column and applied per item. Dietary icons indicate non_veg for both items; per-line icons indicate allergens. Miscellaneous symbol strings kept in extras.unparsed_marks.
